validation.bestOf: Best of must be 0 or an odd number >= 1
validation.players: Both names are required and must be different

match.infiniteDescription: Play continues until the match is reset manually
match.firstToWins: First to {count} round{suffix} wins the match

board.sharedHint: Tap any square to claim, change, or unclaim it
board.separateHint: Tap a square to toggle it on or off for the selected player

setup.subtitle: Enter the checkout range and both player names.
setup.bestOfHint: Use 0 for an infinite match until reset manually.

changeSetup.title: Change players / range?
changeSetup.description: This match is still in progress. You can go to the setup screen to change players or ranges, or cancel and continue the current match.

claim.currentlyClaimedBy: Currently claimed by {name}. You can change or remove it.

reset.title: Reset match?
reset.description: This will clear the current round, reset the match score to 0 - 0, and remove the current progress.
